headline: Jim Cramer Says Oracle Is “Going Down” and Avoid Every Liquor Stock. Here’s What He’d Buy Instead
summary: Cramer named specific sectors he's betting on for late 2026 while calling out two popular investments as traps that investors should exit now, regardless of where they bought in.

headline: Delta vs. United Airlines Stock: Which Is the Better Buy After Q2 Earnings?
summary: Delta Air Lines (DAL) and United Airlines (UAL) have both delivered better-than-expected Q2 results, demonstrating that demand for premium, international, and corporate travel remains resilient.

headline: 3 Stocks Smart Investors Are Buying in July
summary: Berkshire Hathaway just built or expanded positions in an airline, a mega-cap platform, and a battered homebuilder during the same quarter, and the reasoning behind each pick reveals where patient institutional money sees the market mispricing real earnings power.

headline: Can Delta Air Lines (DAL) Stay Reasonable After High Fare Strength?
summary: Delta Air Lines stock has delivered a 118.7% total return over the past 5 years, yet current valuation checks still suggest the shares lean cheap rather than stretched. Over 5 years, a 118.7% return signals that the market has already repriced Delta Air Lines meaningfully higher, so the key issue is whether that re rating has gone too far or not far enough. Stronger pricing power in an industry facing higher fuel and labor costs can support earnings, but any reversal in fare strength or...

headline: 3 Profitable Stocks Walking a Fine Line
summary: Not all profitable companies are built to last - some rely on outdated models or unsustainable advantages. Just because a business is in the green today doesn’t mean it will thrive tomorrow.
